component.name: Mackes Shell
component.summary: Unified XFCE control panel with mesh networking and fleet management

description.p: Mackes Shell is a single-binary control panel for XFCE on Fedora. It bundles desktop settings, mesh VPN networking, and fleet management behind one consistent UI.

ul.li: First-run setup wizard with curated presets (hashbang, mackes, daylight, vanilla)
Mesh networking via Headscale + Tailscale — Join an existing mesh or Host a new one
Remote desktop integration with auto-discovered SSH / RDP / VNC peers via Remmina
Bidirectional clipboard sync across mesh peers
Fleet management via Ansible-pull with curated playbooks
System maintenance: snapshots, drift detection, system updates, dependency checks
Conky HUD with live mesh / fleet / drift / service status

description.p: apply_panel_layout now drives xfce4-panel-profiles for a robust default panel.
